name: Free Trial
description: Try a single session before enrolling
ideal_for: Anyone curious about yoga who wants to experience the practice before committing to a plan
what_to_expect: A 60-minute guided session with the instructor
Introduction to breath work and foundational postures
Personalised feedback at the end of the session
Guidance on which ongoing class best suits you

name: Monthly Plan
ideal_for: Students ready to build a consistent daily practice across all formats and levels
what_to_expect: Unlimited access to all group classes every day
Weekly progress check-ins with the instructor
Access to our private student community
Flexible scheduling — attend any time slot that works for you

name: Advanced Yoga
ideal_for: Dedicated practitioners seeking deep, personalised guidance and accelerated growth
what_to_expect: One-on-one sessions tailored to your specific goals and body
Customised asana sequences and pranayama routines
Access to all group classes in addition to personal sessions
Detailed progress tracking and monthly practice review
